name: Nixix The Noxium Dagger

sheet.name: Nixix The Noxium Dagger
sheet.background_story:
Nixix's misdeeds are notorious even in Noxium, his work with his victims could be considered a work of art.  

He usually wears a black cloak that allows him to keep his daggers and his own constitution, many of his opponents have discovered too late, terrified, that their opponent was a decrepit.

Nixix's actions have no pattern and to this day no one knows his true intentions. 

The fall of Detriti pushed Nixix to come out of the shadows and fight for a burning cause that was growing inside him. DEATH TO AGORA.

The battle is over and The Bulwark of the Serpent has won. Nixix has finished his purpose and returns to the shadows. 

Once again, Nixix emerges from the shadows to fight alongside Detriti, proclaiming death to Agora and death to the living.

Nixix defended the ritual and paid the ultimate price.
